narrative:
Pleasant Twp township has 1,482 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.0 percentage points.
